inputs.prompt: Close-up of an orange tabby cat wearing a tailored navy blue business suit with red tie, behind a professional news anchor desk. The cat is leaning in conspiratorially toward camera, eyes intense. Behind him a large screen cycles showing: a Call of Duty gameplay screenshot with MISSION ACCOMPLISHED text overlay, a gas station price sign reading $6.49, a congressional vote tally graphic. Lower-third chyron banner reads: WAR REBRANDED AS CONTENT. A pen sits at the edge of the desk near the cats paw. Studio lighting is professional broadcast blue and warm key light. Photorealistic, cinematic, 4K.
